summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an independent mixed PR shard. No GitHub mutations, close actions, merge actions, or fix artifacts are planned.

actions.reason: Standalone ready-for-maintainer PR; keep open for maintainer review rather than inventing a canonical or planning a merge.
Focused, apparently viable PR, but this plan-mode shard cannot merge and the maintained review gate remains human maintainer review.
Large independent pending-final recovery PR with proof and technical-scope questions; keep open rather than close or merge.
Small standalone UI bugfix with sufficient proof, but maintainer review is still the correct next step.
Candidate is already closed in live preflight state; no close mutation may be planned.

Independent task-completion PR with passing proof but waiting-on-author status; keep open.
Related to prior thinking-level work but not proven duplicate in this shard; keep as independent maintainer-review work.
